title: Pillow Turkish Burrata Dolma
description: A take on traditional Turkish dolma featuring creamy burrata cheese, a crunchy cure, and a touch of nostalgia. Perfect as a comforting snack or light meal.
instructions: Rinse the cabbage leaves in cold water and set aside to dry.
In a mixing bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, chopped onion, minced parsley, and chopped mint.
Cut the burrata cheese into small pieces and set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Turkish cucumber cure, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Dip each cabbage leaf into the cure mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place a small piece of burrata cheese onto the center of each cabbage leaf.
Roll the dolma into a neat, compact shape, starting from the stem end.
Repeat the process with the remaining cabbage leaves and cheese.
Place the dolma on a serving platter and garnish with additional parsley, if desired.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
